Updated Test Launch Plan (Legitimate & Cheap)

Total cost: ~$60=E2=80=93$80 (first month insurance = + supplies). Everything else free.

Exact Order (3=E2=80=937 days to first test walks):<= /p>

  1. Get Insu= rance (Do This Monday Morning) Go to petcareins.com =E2=86=92 =E2=80=9CDog Walker=E2=80=9D quote =E2=86=92= monthly payment (~$18 first month) =E2=86=92 buy it. Save the proof. This = protects you right away.
  2. Make Sim= ple Flyers Use Canva (free). Put =E2=80=9CCorgi Crew Dog Walking=E2=80=9D, your phone,= Corgi photos, $28 for 30-min walk, and =E2=80=9CFirst walk special=E2=80= =9D. Print 20=E2=80=9350 at home.
  3. Launch F= ree Website Use the HTML code I gave you (I can update it again with any changes). Host= free on Netlify.
  4. Set Up G= oogle Business Profile Free at business.google.com. Use the name =E2=80=9CCorgi Crew Dog Walking= =E2=80=9D + your Corgi photos.
  5. Test wit= h a Few Clients Post on Nextdoor: =E2=80=9CStarting Corgi Crew Dog Walking with my own two = Corgis=E2=80=A6=E2=80=9D Offer to neighbors/friends first. Use cash or Zell= e. Send photo updates.
  6. Do the D= BA Later ($20 at Town Clerk) When you have 3=E2=80=935 regular clients, go register the name officially.=

This is legitimate= , protected, and low-key for testing.

Do you want the full updated business plan again (copy-paste = ready with this test version), or the website HTML refreshed, or a simple c= lient sheet?

Just say and I=E2= =80=99ll give it immediately. You=E2=80=99re ready to test safely! =F0=9F= =90=BE

= =

= Yes. I want the fully updated business plan, copy and paste ready, with thi= s test mode, okay? And I want the website HTML refreshed and a simple clien= t showcase, okay? So I want everything.

<= /div>
=

=E2=9C=85 Here is your FULLY UPDATED, copy-and-paste = ready Business Plan for the legiti= mate low-key test launch of Corgi = Crew Dog Walking.

I included:

  • Test mode (start small, insurance first,= DBA later)
  • Bare minimum costs (under $100)
  • Simple language
  • Exact insurance steps
  • Refreshed website HTML (with the name)
  • Simple client intake sheet (at the end)<= /li>

FINAL BUSINESS PLAN =E2=80=93 Corgi C= rew Dog Walking

Legitimate Low-Key Test Launch Version Copy & Paste Everything Below<= /p>

Yes =E2=80=94 you can do a safe, legitimate test launch for u= nder $100. You get insurance right away (monthly), keep everything basic, use the name= =E2=80=9CCorgi Crew Dog Walking=E2=80=9D, start with just a few clients, a= nd do the $20 DBA later if it grows. Report earnings honestly on unemployme= nt.

Total cost to test launch: ~$60=E2=80=93$80 Total time: 3=E2=80=937 days to fi= rst test walks

SECTION 1: What This Is

You are starting a= small dog walking service called Corgi Cre= w Dog Walking. You use your own two Corgis in the logo. You walk dogs safely, send photo u= pdates, and test if people like it. You do it the right way (insurance first) but keep it simple and cheap at t= he beginning.

SECTION 2: Name & Branding

Business Name: Corgi Crew Dog Walking Logo: Use the versions I made with= your two Corgis. Tagline: =E2=80=9CHappy walks with= happy dogs=E2=80=9D

SECTION 3: Services & Pricing (Te= st Mode)

  • 30-minute walk: $28
  • 60-minute walk: $45
  • Small group: $22 per dog
  • Weekly package: $125

Special: First walk 20=E2=80=9325% off for test clie= nts.

SECTION 4: Bare Minimum Costs (Under = $100)

Total: ~$60=E2=80=93$80

  • Insurance (first month): ~$18 (monthly w= ith PCI)
  • DBA (do later): $20
  • Supplies: $25 (or less)
  • Everything else: $0 (free website, flyer= s at home, etc.)

SECTION 5: Exact Insurance Steps (Do = This First)

Time: 30=E2=80=9360 minutes on Monday

Go to https://ww= w.petcareins.com/

  1. Click =E2=80=9CGet Protected Today=E2=80= =9D or =E2=80=9CBuy My Policy=E2=80=9D.
  2. Choose =E2=80=9CDog Walker=E2=80=9D or = =E2=80=9CPet Sitter=E2=80=9D.
  3. Fill out the quick form.
  4. Select monthly payment.
  5. Buy the first month (~$18). Save the pro= of.

Other options if y= ou want quotes:

  • Pet Sitters Associates: petsitllc.com
  • Call Business Insurers of the Carolinas:= 1-800-962-4611

SECTION 6: Step-by-Step Test Launch P= lan

Total time: 3=E2=80=937 days

  1. Get insurance (Monday).
  2. Make 20=E2=80=9350 flyers in free Canva = (use your Corgi logo).
  3. Launch free website (use the HTML below)= .
  4. Set up free Google Business Profile.
  5. Post on Nextdoor/Facebook with the name.=
  6. Offer test walks to friends/neighbors fi= rst.
  7. Do the $20 DBA at Brookfield Town Clerk = later if you like it.

SECTION 7: Marketing (Keep It Small)<= /strong>

Post friendly mess= ages on Nextdoor. Visit a couple local vets/groomers with flyers. Ask for r= eviews.

SECTION 8: Safety & Operations

  • Get owner info (vet, emergency contact).=
  • Send photos after every walk.
  • Be on time.
  • Track money and miles in a notebook.

Refreshed Website HTML (Copy-Paste Re= ady)

Save this as index.html and host f= ree on netlify.com.

=

It is:

  • In exact= order (sections 1 through 8 + the refreshed website HTML + simple= client intake sheet at the end)
  • Step-by-= step (especially in Section 6)
  • Written in simple, clear language (easy to understand, like explaining to = a 10-year-old)
  • Copy-and= -paste ready into one document

Would you like me = to make any small tweaks (for example, add more pictures, make one section = even simpler, or add a daily checklist)? Just say and I=E2=80=99ll update i= t right away.

What are your recommendations in terms of adding more pictures, m= aking any small tweaks, etc.? I'm looking for your advice here.

Great question! Here are = my specific recommendations for pictures and small tweaks to make your test= launch even better. These are easy and free/cheap.

1. Adding More Pictures (Highly Recommended)

Why: Pictures of your two Corgis make everything mor= e friendly and trustworthy. People love seeing the dogs behind the business= .

What to do:

  • Use 3=E2=80=935 photos of your Corgis (t= he one you shared + more of them happy on walks).
  • Add your own walking photos (you with do= gs) =E2=80=94 even phone pictures are fine.
  • For the website: Put a big hero photo of= your Corgis at the top.
  • For flyers: One big Corgi photo + smalle= r action shots.
  • Google Business Profile: Upload 5=E2=80= =9310 photos of your Corgis and walks.

Free stock photos if needed: Search Unsplash.com for= =E2=80=9Chappy dog walking suburban=E2=80=9D or =E2=80=9CCorgi playing=E2= =80=9D.

Quick win: Add 1=E2=80=932 more Corgi photos to the = website HTML I gave you (I can update the code again if you want).

2. Small Tweaks I Recommend

Website tweaks:

  • Add a short =E2=80=9CAbout=E2=80=9D sect= ion: =E2=80=9CI=E2=80=99m a local Brookfield dog parent with two Corgis. I = provide safe, fun walks with photo updates.=E2=80=9D
  • Add a testimonials placeholder (even if = empty at first): =E2=80=9CComing soon =E2=80=94 first happy clients!=E2=80= =9D
  • Add safety note: =E2=80=9CFully insured = for your peace of mind.=E2=80=9D

Flyer tweaks:

  • Add bullet: =E2=80=9CPhoto updates after= every walk=E2=80=9D
  • Add your Corgi photos prominently
  • Keep it to one page, big text, lots of w= hite space

Business plan tweaks:

  • Add a line in the safety section: =E2=80= =9CI only take dogs I feel comfortable with after a meet & greet.=E2=80= =9D

Marketing tweak:

  • In Nextdoor posts, always include 1=E2= =80=932 Corgi photos.

3. My Overall Advice

  • Focus on= your Corgis =E2=80=94 they are your best marketing tool. Use thei= r photos everywhere (website, flyers, Google profile, posts).
  • Keep it = simple for the test =E2=80=94 Don=E2=80=99t overdo design. A clean= , friendly look with real dog photos is better than fancy graphics.
  • Test wit= h 3=E2=80=935 clients first =E2=80=94 Get feedback and photos/revi= ews before printing lots of flyers.

THOUGHS SUGGESTIONS IN HW AND WHICH T USE?

=

Here are my thoughts and specific = suggestions on how and which photos to use. I looked at all the ne= w ones you shared + the first one.

Overall Strategy

  • Use your Corgis everywhere =E2=80=94 the= y are your best marketing tool.
  • Mix close-ups (cute faces) with full-bod= y/action shots.
  • Keep it consistent: happy, friendly, cle= an backgrounds.

Best Photos & Where to Use Them

For the Main Logo (most important):

  • Top choi= ce: The close-up black/white Corgi looking at camera (r3gwx) =E2= =80=94 very expressive eyes, great for a round or badge logo.
  • Runner-u= p: The pair on the couch (TcvAh) =E2=80=94 shows both dogs togethe= r, perfect if you want =E2=80=9CCrew=E2=80=9D.

For Website Hero (big top photo):

  • The black Corgi by the window (DOAkl) = =E2=80=94 peaceful and cute.
  • Or the orange Corgi with tongue out (h7A= F0) =E2=80=94 super happy energy.

For Flyers & Google Business Profile:

  • The two dogs together (TcvAh)
  • Orange Corgi sitting outside (h7AF0)
  • Black/white Corgi on bed (ueEHn)
  • Santa photo (qfO2m) for holiday/fun vibe= later

For Social Media/Posts:

  • The black Corgi close-up (r3gwx) and the= pair (TcvAh) =E2=80=94 great for Instagram stories.

Quick Tips on How to Use Them

  • Logo: Crop the best face (r3gwx or TcvAh) and add text =E2=80=9CCorgi Crew= Dog Walking=E2=80=9D in clean font.
  • Website:= Big hero photo at top + smaller ones in services section.
  • Flyers:<= /strong> One big photo + 2 small ones. Keep text big and simple.
  • Google P= rofile: Upload all 5=E2=80=936 photos =E2=80=94 Google loves real = dog pictures.

These photos make = your business feel personal and trustworthy.

EHN-BED.jpg" alt=3D"Corgi" class=3D"rounded=
-2xl">
    </section>
</<=
span style=3D"color: rgb(4, 68, 172);">body>
</<=
span style=3D"color: rgb(4, 68, 172);">html>

Flyer Suggestion

  • Big photo: Pair on couch (TcvAh)
  • Small photos: Close-up (r3gwx) + orange = tongue (h7AF0)
  • Text: Same as previous plan

You now have every= thing updated with my creative picks.

Ready to go? Copy the HTML, add your actual image files, and launch the test.

Let me know if you= want any final changes or the full business plan re-given with these photo= s referenced!

This is going to l= ook great. =F0=9F=90=BE=F0=9F=90=BE

WHAT DO I DO NEXT?

<= /button>

Great question! Here's exactly what to do next= , in order:

1. Today / Right Now (30=E2=80=9360 m= inutes)

  • Copy the website HTML I just gave you into a file called index.html.
  • Save your favorite Corgi photos (especia= lly the ones I picked) in the same folder.
  • Go to ne= tlify.com (free), drag the folder in, and your website will be liv= e in minutes. Share the link with me if you want me to check it.

2. Monday Morning (Most Important Ste= p)

  • Get your insurance (30=E2=80=9360 minutes). Go to petcareins.com =E2=86=92 get= the monthly quote for dog walking =E2=86=92 buy the first month (~$18). Save the proof of insurance.

3. Same Day or Tuesday

  • Make 20=E2=80=9350 simple flyers using C= anva (free). Use the photos I suggested.
  • Set up your free Google Business Profile= with the name and Corgi photos.

4. This Week (Test Launch)
  • Post on Nextdoor and local Facebook grou= ps.
  • Offer the first test walks to friends, n= eighbors, or people who reply.
  • Send photo updates after every walk.

5. When Ready (Optional, Later)

  • Go to the Brookfield Town Clerk and do t= he $20 DBA to officially register =E2=80=9CCorgi Crew Dog Walking=E2=80=9D.=

Quick Checklist for This Week

  • Insurance (Monday)<= /li>
  • Website live
  • 20 flyers made
  • First 2=E2=80=933 t= est walks booked
  • Track everything in= a notebook

You=E2=80=99re in = excellent shape. Start with the website and insurance =E2=80=94 those two w= ill make you look real and protected immediately.

What do you want to do first right now? I can help with the website upload questions, flyer text, or anything else.= Just tell me!

You=E2=80=99ve got= this =E2=80=94 let=E2=80=99s get those first test walks happening! =F0=9F= =90=BE=F0=9F=90=BE

pasted-text.txt

lets focus on this- step by step:

<= /div>
=
<= /button>

=E2=9C=85 Here=E2=80=99s the clean, focused st= ep-by-step guide (exactly what to do next, in order).

Step-by-Step: Launch Your Corgi Crew Dog Walking Test Business (Legit= imate & Cheap)

Goal: Get insurance, website, and first test walks i= n the next 3=E2=80=937 days. Total cost: ~$60=E2=80=93$80 (insu= rance first month + supplies). Keep it small: Start with friends/= family or 2=E2=80=934 dogs max.

Step 1: Get Insurance Today or Monday Morning (Most Important= ) Time: 30=E2=80=9360 minutes Go to: https://www.petcareins.com/

  1. Click =E2=80=9CGet Protected Today=E2=80= =9D or =E2=80=9CBuy My Policy=E2=80=9D.
  2. Choose =E2=80=9CDog Walker=E2=80=9D.
  3. Fill out the quick form.
  4. Pick mon= thly payment (~$18 first month).
  5. Buy it and save the proof of insurance.<= /li>

(Other options if = you want more quotes: petsitllc.com or call 1-800-962-4611.)

Do this before anything else.

Step 2: Make Your Website Live (Today or Tuesday) Time: 1=E2=80=932 hours

  1. Copy the full HTML code I gave you in th= e previous message.
  2. Save it as a file called index.html.
  3. Add your logo and 3=E2=80=934 of your Co= rgi photos (the ones I picked: close-up black/white, pair on couch, orange = tongue-out, etc.).
  4. Go to ne= tlify.com (free).
  5. Drag the folder in =E2=86=92 your site g= oes live instantly.

Share the link wit= h me if you want me to check it.

Step 3: Make Simple Flyers (Today or Tuesday) Time: 1 hour

  1. Go to Ca= nva.com (free).
  2. Search =E2=80=9Cdog walker flyer=E2=80= =9D.
  3. Use one of your Corgi photos as the big = image (pair on couch or close-up).
  4. Add:
    • =E2=80=9CCorgi Crew Dog Walking=E2=80=9D=
    • Your phone number
    • Prices ($28 for 30-min, etc.)
    • =E2=80=9CFirst walk special=E2=80=9D
    • =E2=80=9CPhoto updates after every walk= =E2=80=9D
  5. Print 20=E2=80=9350 at home or library.<= /li>

Step 4: Set Up Google Business Profile (Same day) Time: 30=E2=80=9360 minutes

  1. Go to bu= siness.google.com.
  2. Create =E2=80=9CCorgi Crew Dog Walking= =E2=80=9D.
  3. Add your logo, 5+ Corgi photos, phone, a= nd service area (Brookfield + Bethel, Newtown, Danbury, etc.). This helps people find you when they search =E2=80=9Cdog walker near me=E2= =80=9D.

Step 5: Start Getting Test Clients (This Week)

  1. Post on = Nextdoor and local Facebook groups. Example post: =E2=80=9CHi neighbors! I=E2=80=99m starting Corgi Crew Dog Walking with my = own two Corgis. Safe walks with photo updates. First walk special. Text me = at [your number].=E2=80=9D
  2. Offer to friends, family, or neighbors f= irst (easy practice).
  3. Use cash or Zelle. Send a photo after ev= ery walk.

Step 6: Do the DBA Later (When Ready)

  • When you have 3=E2=80=935 regular client= s and like it, go to the Brookfield Town Clerk ($20) and register the name = officially.
  • You can start without it for the test ph= ase.

Daily Tips While Testing

  • Be on time.
  • Send photos + short text after every wal= k.
  • Keep a simple notebook: date, dog, amoun= t earned, miles driven.
  • Only take dogs you feel comfortable with= .

This Week=E2=80=99s Simple Checklist

  • Get insurance (Mond= ay)
  • Website live on Net= lify
  • 20=E2=80=9350 flyer= s made
  • Google Business Pro= file set up
  • Post on Nextdoor
  • Book first 2=E2=80= =933 test walks

You now have the e= xact next actions.

What do you want to do first right now? (Website upload? Insurance? Flyer text? I can help with any of them immedia= tely.)

You=E2=80=99re rea= dy =E2=80=94 let=E2=80=99s get those first test walks happening! =F0=9F=90= =BE

= hlpew me Step 2: Make Your Website Live (Today or Tuesday) Time: 1=E2=80=932 hours Copy the full HTML code I gave you in the previous message. Save it as a file called index.html. Add your logo and 3=E2=80=934 of your Corgi photos (the ones I picked: clos= e-up black/white, pair on couch, orange tongue-out, etc.). Go to netlify.com (free). Drag the folder in =E2=86=92 your site goes live instantly.

=

=E2=9C=85 Here's simple, exact help for St= ep 2: Make Your Website Live

Exact Step-by-Step (Takes 10=E2=80=9330 minutes)

  1. Save the= HTML code
    • Copy the full HTML code I gave you in th= e last message.
    • Open Notepad (Windows) or TextEdit (Mac)= .
    • Paste the code.
    • Save the file as index.html (make sure it says =E2=80=9C= All Files=E2=80=9D not =E2=80=9CText Document=E2=80=9D).
  2. Prepare = your photos
    • Put your favorite Corgi photos (the ones= I picked: close-up black/white, pair on couch, orange tongue-out, etc.) in= the same folder as the index.html file.
    • Rename them simply like logo.png, hero.jpg, corgi1.jpg, corgi2.jpg so it=E2=80=99s easy.
  3. Upload t= o Netlify (Free & Instant)
    • Go to https://netlify.com in you= r browser.
    • Sign up with Google (fastest).
    • Click the big button =E2=80=9CNew site f= rom Git=E2=80=9D or =E2=80=9CDrag and drop=E2=80=9D.
    • Drag the folder that contains your index.html file and t= he photos into the box.
    • Netlify will build it automatically (tak= es 1 minute).
    • You=E2=80=99ll get a live website addres= s like yourname.netlify= .app.
  4. Done! Open the link Netlify gives you. Your site is live. Share the link with me if you want me to look at it and suggest any quick f= ixes.

Quick Tips

  • If you get stuck on the drag-and-drop, N= etlify has a very easy =E2=80=9CSites=E2=80=9D tab =E2=80=94 just drag the = folder there.
  • Later you can buy a custom domain (like = corgicrew.com) for ~$10=E2=80=9315 and connect it (I can help with that ste= p too).

What to do after the site is live? Tell me the website link or any problems you hit, and I=E2=80=99ll help fix= it right away.

Then move to flyer= s and the first Nextdoor post.

You=E2=80=99re doi= ng great =E2=80=94 the website will make you look professional instantly!

Let me know what h= appens or if you need me to update the HTML code again. =F0=9F=90=BE

Copy everything be= low (from <!DOCTYPE = html> to the end) and save it as a file called index.html on your computer.

HTML
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=3D"en">

    <meta charset=3D"U=
TF-8">
    <meta name=3D"view=
port" =
content=3D"width=3Ddevice-width, initial-scale=3D1.0"=
>

ps://cdn.tailwindcss.com"&g=
t;</script>

<body class=3D"bg-ston=
e-50">

    <nav class=3D"bg-w=
hite border-b p-4">
        <<=
/span>div class=3D"=
max-w-4xl mx-auto flex items-center gap-3">
            <!-- Replace with your new logo image -->
            &=
lt;img src=3D"YOUR-LOGO.png" alt=3D"Corgi Crew" class=3D"h-10">
            &=
lt;span class=3D"font-bold text-2xl">=
;Corgi Crew Dog Walking</=
span>
        </=
div>

    <!-- Hero -->
    <header class=3D"b=
g-emerald-700 text-white py-20 text-center">
        <<=
/span>h1 class=3D"t=
ext-5xl font-bold">Corgi=
 Crew Dog Walking</h1>
        <<=
/span>p class=3D"mt=
-4 text-xl">Test Launch =
- Safe walks with photo updates</p>
        <<=
/span>a href=3D"#co=
ntact"=
 class=3D"mt-8 inline-block bg-white text-emerald-700=
 px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold">Book a Test Walk</a>
    </header>

    <!-- Services -->
    <section class=3D"=
max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-12"        <<=
/span>h2 class=3D"t=
ext-3xl font-bold text-center">Services & Pricing</h2>
        <<=
/span>div class=3D"=
grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mt-8">
            &=
lt;div class=3D"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border">30-min Walk - $28</div>
            &=
lt;div class=3D"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border">60-min Walk - $45</div>
            &=
lt;div class=3D"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border">Weekly Package - $125</div>
        </=
div>
    </section>

    <!-- Gallery -->
    <section class=3D"=
bg-white py-12"><=
/span>
        <<=
/span>div class=3D"=
max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            <!-- Add your Corgi photos here -->
            &=
lt;img src=3D"YOUR-CORGI-PHOTO-1.jpg" alt=3D<=
/span>"Corgi" class=3D"rounded-2xl">
            &=
lt;img src=3D"YOUR-CORGI-PHOTO-2.jpg" alt=3D<=
/span>"Corgi" class=3D"rounded-2xl">
            &=
lt;img src=3D"YOUR-CORGI-PHOTO-3.jpg" alt=3D<=

lt;img src=3D"YOUR-CORGI-PHOTO-4.jpg" alt=3D<=

        </=
div>

tact" =
class=3D"bg-emerald-700 text-white py-12 text-center=
">
        <<=
/span>p class=3D"te=
xt-xl">Call or text [You=
r Phone] to book a test walk</p>

Quick Instructions Again

  1. Paste the code above into a new file =E2= =86=92 save as index.ht= ml.
  2. Replace YOUR-LOGO.png and the photo names with your actu= al file names.
  3. Go to ne= tlify.com =E2=86=92 drag the folder with this file + your photos i= nto the site.
  4. Your website will be live instantly.

Let me know when y= ou have it live or if you hit any trouble =E2=80=94 I can help fix the code= or give more instructions.

After the site is = live, next is making the flyers and posting on Nextdoor.
